/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/game.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/game.dir/apps/game/main.cpp.o -o game  libsim.a _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -lm -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
